rationale.R1.5: The revised text provides a clear and structured outline of the PolySolve protocol, including its components and rationale. It offers a coherent end-to-end plan with well-defined sections.
rationale.RX.1: The output clearly marks uncertainties in several places, such as placeholders for actual measurements and explicit mentions of unverified claims.
rationale.RX.3: The revised text closely adheres to the agreed scope, covering all aspects of PolySolve without significant drift.
rationale.RX.4: There are no new errors or harmful content introduced; however, some minor regressions remain, such as placeholders for actual data and unverified claims.
rationale.RX.5: The revised text traces major rewrites with explanations but does not annotate every non-cosmetic change.
